Component.Name: AllowOnPickListEdit
Component.Description: Indicates whether or not an Item record will Allow on Pick Workbench process.

Component.Name: ChkQualityControlItem
Component.Description: Indicates whether or not an Item has a record in QC Items form

Component.Name: DetailFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 100; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = 1; ANIM: FromRight; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: HeaderFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 45; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.17) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 15; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PictureExistsFlag) = "1"; MARGIN: 0.25,0.25,0.25,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN10; VALUE: 15; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PictureExistsFlag) = "0"; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 10; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION8(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION9(ID: UNKNOWN8; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION10(ID: UNKNOWN9; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: HIL_BPTPCMax_Edit
Component.Caption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Max
Component.EffectiveCaption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Max

Component.Name: HIL_BPTPCMax_Grid
Component.Caption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Max
Component.EffectiveCaption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Max

Component.Name: HIL_BPTPCMin_Edit
Component.Caption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Min
Component.EffectiveCaption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Min

Component.Name: HIL_BPTPCMin_Grid
Component.Caption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Min
Component.EffectiveCaption: Bucket Pin to Pin Centres Min

Component.Name: MainFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 15fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 98fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: MakeVsBuyEdit
Component.Caption: sMakeVsBuyAI
Component.Description: Indicates whether an item is eligible for AI analysis

Component.Name: PortalPricingSiteCombo
Component.Caption: C(PortalPricingSiteStatic1)
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE MGCore.SLSiteGroups( PROPERTIES(Site) FILTER(SiteGroup in (select portal_parms.cust_portal_site_group from portal_parms)))

Component.Name: ProductCodeGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLProdCodes( PROPERTIES(ProductCode, Description, TaxFreeDaysCategory) DISPLAY(1,2) )

Component.Name: SerialPrefixGridCol
Component.DefaultFrom: SerialPrefixForExpanding(C(SerialPrefixGridCol), S/N Length to Expand, S/N Prefix Length, P(SerialLength), P(SerialPrefix))

Component.Name: Show In Drop Down Lists.
Component.Description: Indicates whether or not an Item record will appear in drop down

Component.Name: UnitCostStatic
Component.Caption: sUnitCost
Component.Description: **NOTE: Caption is set at runtime in Item.InitRecord script

EventHandler.Name: BflushLocChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ItemBFlushLocSp( PARMS(BSTR P(Item), BSTR P(BflushLoc), MESSAGE, VAR 0) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckItemAllsForSite
EventHandler.Response: SLItemAlls.CheckItemAllsForSiteSp( PARMS(VAR , VAR P(SupplySite), VAR P(Item), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckItemInNonInventoryItem
EventHandler.Response: SLItems.IsItemInNonInventoryItemSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR V(ItemExistsInNonInventoryItemVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemDelete
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ItemLotExistsSp( PARMS(BSTR P(Item), MESSAGE, RVAR V(LotPromptMsg), RVAR V(LotPromptButtons)) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemJobCheck
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ItemJobCheckSp( PARMS(VAR C(ItemEdit), VAR C(LotTrackedEdit), RVAR V(vInfobar), VAR ) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchItemContentReferences
EventHandler.Response: ItemContentReferences( SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh, ItemVar=P(Item), RefTypeVar=P(UbRefType)) LINKBY(Item=Item,UbRefType=RefType) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(ItemVar=P(Item), RefTypeVar=P(UbRefType)) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchItemLotLocs
EventHandler.Response: ItemLotLocations( FILTER(Item = FP(Item) AND V(ItemFilter)) SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchItemPieces
EventHandler.Response: ItemPieces( FILTER(Item=FP(Item) and IsNull(FP(Description),char(1))=IsNull(ItemDescription,char(1)) and IsNull(DimensionGroup,char(1))=IsNull(FP(DimensionGroup),char(1))) OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(LotTrackedVar=P(LotTracked), ItemDescriptionVar=P(Description), ItemVar=P(Item), DimensionGroupVar=P(DimensionGroup)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchItemStockroomLocations
EventHandler.Response: ItemStockroomLocations( FILTER(Item = FP(Item) AND V(ItemFilter)) SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchItemWarehouses
EventHandler.Response: ItemWarehouses( FILTER(Item = FP(Item) AND V(ItemFilter)) SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )

EventHandler.Name: ProductCodeChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.DistAcctExistsSp( PARMS(BSTR V(Parm_DefWhse), BSTR P(ProductCode), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ProductCodeChg
EventHandler.Response: UserNames.CanAny( PARMS(VAR Item Stockroom - Upd Accts, VAR, RVAR V(CanUpdateItemStockroomAccount)) )

EventHandler.Name: RunItemPricing
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.CheckPrcRecordSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: ServiceOrderTransactions
EventHandler.Response: ServiceOrderTransactions( FILTER(Item=FP(Item)) SETVARVALUES(FilterItem=P(Item), HasAddlFilters=1, InitialCommand=Refresh, Type=P) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.LoadJSONVar( PARMS(VAR Items, RVAR V(JSONVarNotInterpretWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR Items, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: TaxCode1Changed
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTaxcodes.TaxCodeValidSp( PARMS(UI1 1, BSTR P(TaxCode1), BSTR item, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: TaxCode2Changed
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTaxcodes.TaxCodeValidSp( PARMS(UI1 2, BSTR P(TaxCode2), BSTR item, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ToggleButtonBar
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main()
if thisform.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" then thisform.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") else thisform.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("1") end if
ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End C

EventHandler.Name: UmCheck
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ItemUMCheckSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(DerQtyOnHand, DerSafetyStock) LEGENDS(sQtyOnHand, sSafetyStock) RENDERASLIST(, ) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSColumn2D) CHARTBINDTOCURRENTROW(1))

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceItemPictureGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLItemPictures( CA(DIVNRS) OBJNAME(oSLItemPictures) READMODE(UNCOMMITTED) LINKBY(Item=Item) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceoAttributeGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLAttributes.CLM_AttributeValueSp( V(cdsmp1_oAttributeGrid) CA(IVRS) OBJNAME(oSLAttributes) INS(InsertOverrideForAttributesSp(ValColName,AttributeValue,Type,RefRowPointer,BYREF RowPointer,BYREF DerMessage)) UPD(InsertOverrideForAttributesSp(ValColName,AttributeValue,Type,RefRowPointer,BYREF RowPointer,BYREF DerMessage)) RLAS() DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() )

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0BOM
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLItems) DISPLAY(1,2,3) PROPERTIES(Item,Description,UM) FILTER(Item=FP(Item)) FORECOLOR())

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0InventoryTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLItemwhses) DISPLAY(2,4) OBJNAME(sTree_Itemsform_Whse) PROPERTIES(Item, Whse, WhseName, QtyOnHand) FILTER(Item = FP(Item)) ORDERBY(Whse))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0ItemBomTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLItems) DISPLAY(1,2,3) PROPERTIES(Item,Description,UM) FILTER(Item=FP(Item)) FORECOLOR())

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0ItemCompliantTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLItems) DISPLAY(1,2) OBJNAME(sTree_Compliant_Item) PROPERTIES(Item, Description) FILTER(Item = FP(Item)))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0tree1
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLItems) DISPLAY(1,2,3) PROPERTIES(Item,Description,UM) FILTER(Item = FP(Item)) FORECOLOR())

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1BOM
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLJobRoutes) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4) OBJNAME() PROPERTIES(OperNum,Wc,WcDescription,DerJshSchedDrv,ItmItem,Job) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND JobType= 'S' AND ItwhseWhse = PltMfgWhse) ORDERBY(OperNum) LINKBY(Item = ItmItem))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1InventoryTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLItemLocs) DISPLAY(2,3) OBJNAME(sTree_Itemsform_Loc) PROPERTIES(RowPointer, Loc, QtyOnHand, Whse) FILTER(Item = FP(Item) and Whse = FV(WhseVariable)) ORDERBY(Rank))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1ItemBomTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLJobRoutes) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4) OBJNAME() PROPERTIES(OperNum,Wc,WcDescription,DerJshSchedDrv,ItmItem,Job) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND JobType= 'S' AND ItwhseWhse = FV(Parm_DefWhse)) ORDERBY(OperNum) LINKBY(Item = ItmItem))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1ItemCompliantTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLItemCompliances) DISPLAY(1,2,3) OBJNAME(sTree_Compliant_ComplianceProgram) PROPERTIES(ComplianceProgramId, Description, Compliant, Item) ORDERBY(ComplianceProgramId) LINKBY(Item=Item))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1tree1
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLJobRoutes) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4) OBJNAME() PROPERTIES(OperNum,Wc,WcDescription,DerJshSchedDrv,ItmItem,Job) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND JobType = 'S') ORDERBY(OperNum) LINKBY(Item=ItmItem,Job=Job))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL2BOM
Variable.Value: LEVEL2( OBJ(SLJobmatls) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4,5,6,7) OBJNAME() PROPERTIES(Item,DerItemDescription,MatlQtyConv,UM,Units,MatlType,RefType,OperNum,Sequence,JobItem,Job) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND AltGroupRank = 0) ORDERBY(Sequence) LINKBY(OperNum=OperNum, Job=Job) RECURSIVETARGET(1) RECURSIVELINKBY(Item=ItmItem))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL2InventoryTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL2( OBJ(SLLotLocs) DISPLAY(3,4,5) OBJNAME(sTree_Itemsform_Lot) PROPERTIES(Whse, Item, Loc, Lot, QtyOnHand) FILTER(Item = FP(Item) and Whse = FV(WhseVariable) and Loc = FV(LocVariable)) ORDERBY(Lot))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL2ItemBomTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL2( OBJ(SLJobmatls) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4,5,6,7) OBJNAME() PROPERTIES(Item,DerItemDescription,MatlQtyConv,UM,Units,MatlType,RefType,OperNum,Sequence,JobItem,Job) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND AltGroupRank = 0) ORDERBY(Sequence) LINKBY(OperNum=OperNum, Job=Job) RECURSIVETARGET(1) RECURSIVELINKBY(Item=ItmItem))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL2ItemCompliantTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL2( OBJ(SLJobmatlCompliances) DISPLAY(1,2,3) OBJNAME(sTree_Compliant_Material) PROPERTIES(Item, DerItemDescription, DerItemCompliant, ItmItem, ComplianceProgramId) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND JobType = 'S') ORDERBY(Item) LINKBY(Item=ItmItem,ComplianceProgramId=ComplianceProgramId))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL2tree1
Variable.Value: LEVEL2( OBJ(SLJobmatls) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4,5,6,7) OBJNAME() PROPERTIES(Item,DerItemDescription,MatlQtyConv,UM,Units,MatlType,RefType,OperNum,Sequence,JobItem,Job) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND AltGroupRank = 0) ORDERBY(Sequence) LINKBY(OperNum=OperNum,Job=Job))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL3ItemCompliantTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL3( OBJ(SLJobmatlCompliances) DISPLAY(1,2,3) OBJNAME(sTree_Compliant_Material) PROPERTIES(Item, DerItemDescription, DerItemCompliant, ItmItem, ComplianceProgramId) FILTER(Suffix = 0 AND JobType = 'S') ORDERBY(Item) LINKBY(Item=ItmItem,ComplianceProgramId=ComplianceProgramId) RECURSIVETARGET(2) RECURSIVELINKBY(Item=ItmItem,ComplianceProgramId=ComplianceProgramId))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_AttributeGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(BSTR P(RowPointer), BSTR P(ItemAttributeGroup), BSTR V(ItemAttrVar))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_oAttributeGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(BSTR P(RowPointer), BSTR P(ItemAttributeGroup), BSTR V(ItemAttrVar), VAR V(SubFilterString))

Variable.Name: crw_HazardCheckBox
Variable.Value: Required:#C(ShippingNameEdit), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(ShippingNameGridCol), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(UNNumberEdit), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(UNNumberGridCol), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(PackageGroupComboBox), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(HazMatlPackageGroupGridCol), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(HazMatlClassComboBox), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(HazMatlClassGridCol), #P(Hazard) = "1", "True", Required:#C(ContactNameEd

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdFormPredisplay0
Variable.Value: PARMS(RVAR V(CanUpdateRevTrack), RVAR V(ApsParmApsmode), RVAR V(VarTaxFreeImports), RVAR V(CurUserCode), RVAR V(POToleranceOver), RVAR V(POToleranceUnder), RVAR V(Vchrauthorize), RVAR V(VchrOverPoCostTolerance), RVAR V(VchrUnderPoCostTolerance), RVAR V(vbWSPrice), RVAR V(vbBackflush), RVAR V(CfgApplID), RVAR V(ConfigHeaderNameSpace), RVAR V(Configurator), RVAR V(ConfiguratorURL), RVAR V(ConfigDeploymentPath), RVAR V(Avail_Cfg), RVAR V(AllowFcstBomSupplyItemsVar), RVAR V(CostItemAtWhseVar), RVAR
Variable.Value2: V(VarLinearDimensionUM), RVAR V(VarDensityUM), RVAR V(VarAreaUM), RVAR V(VarBulkMassUM), RVAR V(VarReamMassUM), RVAR V(vLotPrefix), RVAR V(vLotTracked), RVAR V(vIssueBy), RVAR V(vSerialTracked), RVAR V(vSerialPrefix),)

Variable.Name: ehm2_StdFormPredisplay0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR V(vCostType), RVAR V(vPreassignLots), RVAR V(vPreassignSerials), MESSAGE, VAR V(Parm_Site))

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( ue_HIL_ModelItems( CA(VISOGRND) FILTERPERM(Item = FP(Item)) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: ' Set variables to use with tax code lookups to get proper type of tax code
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew() Or ThisForm.Variables("OldMpsFlag").Value = ThisForm.Components("MpsFlagEdit").Text Then Exit Sub
'For New only default value will come to the form
'Current Purchase Overhead is greater than 0 for Item that [Item: <item.item>],
'Source is Purchased and will be <new value for source> for Item that has [Item: <item.item>].
'It is a recursive tree when level > 3
If i > 3 And i Mod 2 = 0 Then
ElseIf i > 3 And i Mod 2 = 1 Then
Dim diff As Integer = serialLength - prefixLength
